ha9f1a7d9g3c9ag4907g887fg01930b41266b: *The automaton stands lifeless before you, gears silent, head low and heavy.*
hdcbd4eb3g6e76g4ecagae68g87f0aa089707: Command as you see fit, my lord, my liege.
h69afdda0gbfc4g4f0dgb7a0g6bb5db9746a9: "How can I trust? How will I ever know? / How can I show myself, my darkest me?"
hf2ba739dg9567g4e71g98dagc73b22f85b2f: If you do not your deepest secrets show? / Reveal your truth, give what you wish to see.
h46d79bd0g5ffag45f6ga5cfg4eb86c4ed25b: "These empty sheets are all that's left of you. / The last of all the thoughtless gifts you gave."
h503cbcadg599ag4d17gaff9g055d5069d0fd: I will hold onto them; it's all that I can do. / I can't throw them away; I've never been that brave.
hdd6f9f5dg6f72g4ed6g8359g3f1386521c76: My fault, my fault - I've nothing left to give.
h956d0bd5gcd28g4a7bga688g6aa7582c789b: "There is a light in every living thing. / It's crawling t'wards the surface to survive."
hacc96815g1639g41cbgaf25g989eee5091e1: And in its wake, it tramples everything. / We'll kill the rest, so that the one can thrive.
h472c0097g0601g42cdga18dg5c51109c64c9: "The silence stretches on - I'm all alone. / Please, can I hold your hands, for just a while?"
hb3654902g7cd3g4b10gb283ga43be4b566f5: Of course, my love. Don't be afraid, sweet girl.
h5c7ca779gba9eg4aa9gaf8ag810a09fed82f: *His hands close around the air next to your face, as if he's taking the hands of someone taller.*
h82ee270fg6210g4f59gbf05gc62bc4c0a421: What can I do? Say, would you like a hug?
h696354ebg5f0cg440ega059g69e547ebeb34: Come here. For just a moment. Let it out.
hb7e7a03cg0da9g4dd7g8ab2ge6da51587fe0: Remember: you are loved, Lenore. So much.
h54a6475eg43d8g4c60g9d73g06d2b4dd54fa: You're doing great. And everyone will be / so proud of you.
hfb751402gf948g40e7g9543g099c0f2e020d: You're strong. You're stronger than you ever knew.
heb2cd027g10aag439egb890g1f79fbce3b2c: Remember. I am always here for you.
h7202288bge52ag4249g8ca9g55564e24acf3: And you will never walk this path alone.
h57626f48gc850g4b3egbaceg0ad3e86f0e39: What can I do? Say, would you like a hug?
hbea36e47gadbbg45b0gb4b7g1d26cdb0b818: Come here. For just a moment. Let it out.
h0a0ba5dbgaeb8g4e57ga36fga90a3ec0599d: *His arms are too tight and too low for a comfortable hug - as if he's meant to be embracing someone slightly shorter.*
hf3807c82gc800g4493g9f0bg6984449b4f98: Remember: you are loved, Lenore. So much.
h306e4ce8gf086g4c0dgb717gb55421605826: You're doing great. And everyone will be / so proud of you.
hf01a9afcgcc1bg42d3ga67dgef08d451016b: You're strong. You're stronger than you ever knew.
h56c3e244g3126g4659ga588gbdc49e61d32b: Remember. I am always here for you.
hb5e63416g3f2dg437dg9cc1g1f87b95649ef: And you will never walk this path alone.
h55623eefgcdc8g4c7bgb724ga09da4463112: An unbeknownst command that I cannot fulfill.
h512e8a92geefeg4e61gb6eege02c9750bc4d: Be welcome in this house. I wait for your commands.
h1d4cbb10ga05eg4cf8g9150g82fd6a9f68c4: New sounds through damp and dark oppression break / Is it the foe, that foul, contemptuous heel?
hff80ce0dg1b23g4022gaa9fgc4704d75fa80: *Long hours spent studying at your college come back to you - this is the opening stanza of an old play, 'The Roads to Darkness'.*
hf418bc19g1a12g4095gb718gaffaa582f380: *You know these words - they are from the opening stanza of a play you found in this very tower.*
h5c45880bgbbb6g499egb7b0g3d03c0543d5f: "Or art thou friend, a rescue from my lonely wake?"
h259fef43ge17dg40d1g82a0ga400bd91f52a: Come out of love for me, not love for blood and steel...
h27477ebegb955g4da4gb3b5gdecfff198d10: Out of my way. I'm not interested in riddles.
hb5b1ba0cge851g4e55g9574g42cd97bcc40d: An unbeknownst command by fools that would intrude.
h1496ce6dgc9d9g45f7g9d71ge3c3f310e009: Now steel shall ring: false tongue will speak no more!
h5554d20dg2737g48bagaa48g5fb6113d1299: I'm a friend. I come in peace.
hfe0bd13fg4988g414cgab6fgbe527e725fd7: I'm not foul or contemptuous, but I am a foe.
h7e343514g8968g44aeg8898gbb1be22a416f: Attack it while it waits for an answer.
